---
title: "Resume"
---



## Education

1. B.Sc.- Delhi University (India)
2. MCA- Indraprasth University (India)
3. MBA – University Canada West  
Expected Graduation: 2026

## Experience

1. Clerk in School

Responsibilities- Maintained and organized student and staff records and school documents.

-Assisted with student admissions, registrations, and fee record management.

-Handled office administration tasks including filing, data entry, and correspondence.

-Responded to parent and visitor inquiries and supported daily school operations.

-Assisted in preparing exam schedules, reports, and official school documentation.

2. Customer Service Associate – Retail Industry

Responsibilities included customer support, teamwork, and problem solving.

## Skills

- Financial Analysis
- Data Analytics
- Strategic Planning
